---
title: "UpdateSubmission"
description: "This class can be used to build a valid submission for an Update. It provides create(String, String, Update) for initial creation and methods to set optional parameters e.g withActAs(List), withWorkflowId(String) etc. Usage: var submission = UpdateSubmission.create(userId, commandId, update) .withAccessToken(token) .withParty(party) .with..."
---
